title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.150 - Determination of tax levy (first class counties)
text:
205.150.  Determination of tax levy (first class counties). — The rate of tax levy provided for in section 205.141 and this section shall be determined and fixed at the same time the rate of tax is determined and fixed for county purposes.
(L. 1947 V. II p. 335 § 2, A.L. 1961 p. 521, A.L. 1973 S.B. 253)
